headline: NCLH Leans on Turnaround Strategy: Is Performance Set to Improve?
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line pushes a turnaround plan to fix execution gaps, boost efficiency and unlock revenues, but meaningful gains may not fully emerge until 2027.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Carnival Corporation (CCL) After Its Strong Three Year Rebound?
summary: Wondering whether Carnival Corporation & at around US$25.73 is still a value opportunity or if the easy gains are behind it? This article walks through what the current price really implies. The stock has returned 6.5% over the last 7 days, while the 30 day and year to date returns of 15.4% and 16.8% declines sit against a 23.5% gain over the past year and a very large 3 year return of 161.4%. Recent coverage has focused on Carnival Corporation &'s share price swings and what they might...

headline: Carnival Corp. (CCL) Upgraded by Morgan Stanley
summary: Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE:CCL) is one of the 15 large cap stocks under $30 with huge upside potential. On March 19, Jamie Rollo from Morgan Stanley upgraded his rating on Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE:CCL) from Equal Weight to Overweight.
